items.name: opendetail-client
items.title: OpenDetail Client
items.description: Placeholder client-side helpers for future NDJSON transport and stream parsing.

items.name: use-opendetail
items.title: useOpenDetail
items.description: Placeholder hook scaffold for future assistant request, stream, and UI state.

items.name: assistant-shell
items.title: Assistant Shell
items.description: Centered thread and input composition matching the canonical OpenDetail shell frame.

items.name: assistant-input
items.title: Assistant Input
items.description: Exact Figma input primitive with animated multiline layout, send or stop action, and a submit contract shaped like { question: string }.

items.name: assistant-thread
items.title: Assistant Thread
items.description: Thread container for OpenDetail conversations with optional Motion-based reveal.

items.name: assistant-user-message
items.title: Assistant User Message
items.description: Question row primitive with the OpenDetail badge and muted query styling from the shell design.

items.name: assistant-response
items.title: Assistant Response
items.description: Assistant answer primitive with lead text, optional image, markdown slot content, and response metadata.

items.name: assistant-sources
items.title: Assistant Sources
items.description: Expandable source-count metadata and citations list for assistant responses.

items.name: assistant-status
items.title: Assistant Status
items.description: Reusable pill primitive for thinking and error states used by assistant-input.

items.name: assistant-error
items.title: Assistant Error
items.description: Compatibility alias that renders assistant-status with the error pill treatment.

items.name: assistant-overlay
items.title: Assistant Overlay
items.description: Thin overlay wrapper around the assistant shell composition.
items.docs: Uses the shell directly and stays intentionally unopinionated in this pass.

items.name: assistant-modal
items.title: Assistant Modal
items.description: Thin modal wrapper around the assistant shell composition.
items.docs: Uses the shell directly and stays intentionally unopinionated in this pass.

items.name: assistant-sidebar
items.title: Assistant Sidebar
items.description: Thin sidebar wrapper around the assistant shell composition.
items.docs: Uses the shell directly and stays intentionally unopinionated in this pass.

items.name: opendetail-base
items.title: OpenDetail Base Theme
items.description: Shared theme tokens and semantic classes for OpenDetail assistant primitives.
items.docs: Import the installed stylesheet from your app's global CSS entry after `@import "tailwindcss";`, for example `@import "@/styles/opendetail-base.css";`. It includes the tw-shimmer import plus the shared OpenDetail tokens and semantic component classes.
